master_row.title: Zero-Point Fluctuations
master_row.canonical_statement: This expression quantifies the residual fluctuations of fields at zero temperature near the TZP.
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as an expectation / trace over state relating ħ, ω, η.

master_row.encyclopedia: Zero-point fluctuations are represented as the weighted variance of field amplitudes over the allowed frequency spectrum. Interpretive role: This entry gives the quantum side of the canon a finite control parameter. It also links the zero-point picture to publication-ready equations by making the spectral regulator explicit instead of hiding it in narrative prose.
